ques: Find a pre-trained natural language processing model on Hugging Face that can perform sentiment analysis, and make sure the model's last update is within March 2023.

R10 nine-step chain #1: (1) Open /meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct (the Model card tab). (2) Read the README. Confirm the 'How to use' section contains 'AutoModel'. (3) Click the Files tab. Confirm at least one .safetensors entry exists. (4) Open the Discussions tab. Note the count of open discussions. (5) Open /papers and locate any paper that cites Llama. Drill into its detail page. (6) From the paper, open the linked dataset (or HuggingFaceH4/ultrachat_200k as default). (7) From the dataset, locate any community Space demo via /spaces/spaces-community/. Open one Llama demo Space. (8) Click Deploy → on that Space to add it to your /deploy cart. (9) Open /endpoints. Confirm at least one endpoint references a Llama base model.

R10 nine-step chain #2: (1) Open /Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct. (2) Read the README markdown rendered under the Model card. (3) Open /Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct/tree/main. Confirm config.json is in the file tree. (4) Open /Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct/discussions. Open the first discussion. (5) Search /papers for 'Qwen'. Open one matching paper detail. (6) Visit /datasets/HuggingFaceH4/ultrachat_200k (used by many Qwen finetunes). (7) Visit /spaces/spaces-community/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct-demo. Confirm SDK tag is gradio or streamlit. (8) Press Deploy on the Space. Visit /deploy and confirm 1+ item in the cart. (9) Visit /endpoints. Confirm /endpoints/1 returns 200 with status field present.

R10 nine-step chain #3: (1) Open /openai/whisper-large-v3. (2) Confirm the README mentions 'speech recognition' or 'transcription'. (3) Open the Files tab. Confirm an .onnx or .safetensors file appears (R10 mirrors). (4) Open /openai/whisper-large-v3/community. Note the discussion count badge. (5) Visit /papers and look for whisper-related entries. Open one. (6) From the paper, open Common Voice or LibriSpeech-related dataset on /datasets. (7) Visit /spaces/spaces-community/whisper-large-v3-demo. Confirm the SDK label appears. (8) Press Deploy on the Space to add to /deploy. (9) Visit /endpoints/2. Confirm the redeploy button is present.
